overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a spaceship in a space simulation game, approaching a large Earth-like planet. The vessel moves steadily forward through space with holographic HUD displays visible, gradually closing distance to the planetary body.

events.description: target lock on planetary body is disengaged, reticle disappears from HUD

agents.ego_description: piloting the spacecraft on approach vector toward the planet, monitoring flight instruments and holographic displays

entered.detail: large terrestrial planet with visible continents, oceans, and cloud formations illuminated by starlight
metallic structural frame of the spacecraft cockpit surrounding the viewport
distant star field visible in the blackness of space surrounding the planet

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from a spaceship cockpit approaching a distant planet positioned on the right side of the frame. The HUD displays targeting information which disengages early in the sequence. The vessel maintains steady forward momentum through the starfield as the planet gradually grows larger in the viewport.

scene_state.functional_zone: close planetary approach with surface details becoming visible

agents.ego_description: continuing the descent toward the planet surface, adjusting pitch to center the planetary body in the viewport

segments.scene_description: The approach continues with the planet now dominating the central view and growing significantly larger as the distance closes. The starfield becomes progressively obscured by the planet's expanding disk filling the viewport. Surface details of continents and cloud patterns become more defined as the spacecraft maintains its forward trajectory.

_inventory_raw:
=== Segment 0 [0.0s - 8.0s] ===
[t=0s] planet_earthlike(right_far), cockpit_frame(center_near), space_stars(full)
[t=4s] planet_earthlike(right_mid), cockpit_frame(center_near), space_stars(full)
[t=8s] planet_earthlike(center_mid), cockpit_frame(center_near), space_stars(partial)

=== Segment 1 [8.0s - 16.0s] ===
[t=8s] planet_earthlike(center_mid), cockpit_frame(center_near), space_stars(partial)
[t=12s] planet_earthlike(center_near), cockpit_frame(center_near), space_stars(mostly_blocked)
[t=16s] planet_earthlike(center_near), cockpit_frame(center_near), space_stars(not_visible)

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a spaceship cockpit as a distant planet grows from a small celestial body into a dominant planetary disk. It begins with the vessel moving through a starfield toward a planet positioned on the right, while holographic HUD targeting information is visible before disengaging. As the spacecraft maintains its steady forward momentum, the planet shifts toward the center of the frame and expands significantly in size. The surrounding starfield becomes progressively obscured as the planet's disk fills the viewport, allowing surface details of continents and cloud patterns to become more defined. The scene finally culminates in a close-up approach where the planetary body completely dominates the view.
